title: The Reserve and Auxiliary Air Forces Act, 1952
full_text: The Reserve and Auxiliary Air Forces Act, 1952 रिजर्व और सहायक वायु सेना अधिनियम, 1952 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1952-62 Act Number: 62 Enactment Date: 1952-08-22 Act Year: 1952 Short Title: The Reserve and Auxiliary Air Forces Act, 1952 Hindi Title: रिजर्व और सहायक वायु सेना अधिनियम, 1952 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution and regulation of certain Air Force Reserve and also an Auxiliary Air Force and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 15-08-1955 Notification: Chapters II and III and provisions of Chapters V and VI except so far as they relate to the Auxiliary Air Force came into force on the 15th August, 1955, vide S.R.O. 332, dated the 20th August, 1955, Gazette of India, Part II, sec. 4. Chapter IV and provisions of Chapters V and VI relating to the Auxiliary Air Force came into force on the 15th October, 1955, vide S.R.O. 395, dated the 15th October, 1955, Gazette of India, Part II, sec. 4. Section 18. Constitution of Auxiliary Air Force. Section 19. Classes of persons in the Auxiliary Air Force. Section 20. Officers of the Auxiliary Air Force. Section 21. Persons eligible for enrolment. Section 22. Period of service. Section 23. Termination of service. Section 24. Advisory Committees. Section 25. Liability to be called up for service. Section 26. Application of Air Force Act, 1950. Section 27. Reinstatement in civil employ of persons required to perform service under this Act. Section 28. Preservation of certain rights of persons called up for service. Section 29. Pay and allowances. Section 30. Penalties. Section 31. Service of notice. Section 32. Repealed.
